level.setting: Sunken Temple of the Tectonic Deep

pickup.name: Magnetic Lodestone
pickup.effect: Increases elemental conductivity

encounters.trigger: Approaching the altar unlocks the inner sanctum doors

pickup.name: Crystalline Focus
pickup.effect: Stabilizes unstable rock magic

encounters.trigger: Reading the ancient inscription causes the floor to collapse into the boss arena

pickup.name: Heart of the Mountain
pickup.effect: Grants immense tectonic power against the boss

encounters.trigger: Defeating the wraith reveals the path to the Boss Chamber

boss.name: Leviathan of the Earth's Crust
boss.victory_condition: Channeling the Heart of the Mountain into the temple foundation

level.objective: Seal the rift leaking corruption into the ocean floor
level.reward: The Title of Deep Earth Warden

level.setting: The Abyssal Gardens, a bioluminescent coral reef

pickup.name: Shell Trumpet
pickup.effect: Can summon a friendly school of fish to distract enemies.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the jellyfish clears the kelp barrier, revealing the path to the Sunken Grotto.

pickup.name: Bioluminescent Pearl
pickup.effect: Allows the player to illuminate dark areas and reveal hidden structures.

encounters.trigger: After soothing the crab, the Bioluminescent Pearl lights up a mural showing the entrance to the Sovereign's Throne.

pickup.name: Ancient Trident Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the central gate leading to the Abyssal Sovereign.

encounters.trigger: Binding the eel allows the player to safely retrieve the Ancient Trident Key.

boss.name: The Abyssal Sovereign
boss.victory_condition: Insert the Ancient Trident Key into the central altar to calm the Sovereign.

level.objective: Restore tranquility to the reef by calming the Abyssal Sovereign.
level.reward: The ability to command marine life and access to the deep ocean sanctuary.

pickup.name: Soul-Binding Kelp
pickup.effect: Allows binding of spirits to physical items

encounters.trigger: Defeating the sentry collapses the ceiling, revealing the path to the inner sanctum.

pickup.name: Corroded Iron Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the Forbidden Archive Gate

encounters.trigger: After killing the wraith, the bioluminescence fades, highlighting the entrance to the Archive.

pickup.name: Heart of the Tide
pickup.effect: Infuses weapons with pure crushing pressure

encounters.trigger: Victory against the Spawn shatters the seal on the boss chamber door.

boss.name: The Drowned Lich King
boss.victory_condition: Purge the undead corruption from the seabed

level.objective: Retrieve the Abyssal Crown from the Drowned Lich King to restore life to the ocean floor.

enemy.name: Abyssal Eel
enemy.weakness: Lightning Trident electricity conductivity in water

pickup.name: Magnetic Battery Core
pickup.effect: Increases shock radius by 200 percent

encounters.trigger: Opening the rusted iron gate releases the eel and reveals the path to the Altar

enemy.name: Crustacean Sentinel
enemy.weakness: Magnetic Battery Core electromagnetic pulse interference

pickup.name: Thermal Fuse
pickup.effect: Makes Lightning Trident strikes cauterizing

encounters.trigger: Placing the Battery Core into the console triggers the Sentinel and locks the exit

pickup.name: Ancient Keystone
pickup.effect: Unlocks the Boss Sanctum seal

encounters.trigger: Using the Thermal Fuse to weld the door open summons the Hydra

boss.name: The Leviathan Matriarch
boss.weakness: Ancient Keystone activation causing resonant frequency destabilization
boss.victory_condition: Channel Ancient Keystone energy into the Leviathan's core

level.objective: Purge the cathedral of encroaching void corruption and seal the rift

pickup.name: Luminescent Pearl
pickup.effect: Allows visibility in absolute darkness

encounters.trigger: Defeating the prowler reveals a hidden mechanism that opens the door to the submerged archives.

encounters.hazard: Shifting floor tiles that cause drowning damage

pickup.name: Coral Resonance Tuning Fork
pickup.effect: Vibrates near brittle structural weaknesses

encounters.trigger: Using the pearl to blind the sentry reveals a secret passage leading to the crypts.

pickup.name: Abyssal Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the throne room of the Leviathan

encounters.trigger: The death of the wraith allows the player to retrieve the Abyssal Key to access the boss chamber.

boss.name: Leviathan of the Deep
boss.victory_condition: Use the tuning fork to break the shell and finish with the Void-Etched Dagger

level.objective: Retrieve the Heart of the Sea from the Leviathan's chamber.
level.reward: The Abyssal Shadow Blade, allowing permanent invisibility in water.

pickup.name: Pressurized Oxygen Canister
pickup.effect: Increases movement speed and fire-based projectile range by 20%

encounters.trigger: Destroying the drone triggers an alarm that opens the bulkhead to the Reactor Core

pickup.name: Liquid Phosphorus Vial
pickup.effect: Coats the Thermal Burst Staff to inflict burning damage over time

encounters.trigger: Defeating the eel-bot forces the coolant systems to reverse, clearing the path to the command center

pickup.name: Experimental Hydro-Shield Core
pickup.effect: Immunity to explosive damage and high-pressure attacks

encounters.trigger: The sentry's destruction causes a breach that drops the player directly into the boss arena

boss.name: Overlord Poseidon-Unit
boss.victory_condition: Use the Hydro-Shield to deflect the boss's core blast back at itself, then strike with the enchanted staff

level.objective: Escape the imploding facility by disabling the central command network.

pickup.name: Superheated Plasma Core
pickup.effect: Grants thermal discharge capability

encounters.trigger: Opening the main bulkhead alerts nearby maintenance drones

pickup.name: Acoustic Resonance Module
pickup.effect: Emits frequencies that disrupt bioluminescent creature nervous systems

encounters.trigger: Collecting the Plasma Core triggers a structural collapse, sealing the escape route and forcing path forward

pickup.name: Master Override Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the central containment chamber

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the stalker clears the path to the main containment bulkhead

boss.name: Leviathan Containment Unit
boss.victory_condition: Use the Override Key to force emergency ejection of the boss into the crushing depth

level.objective: Escape the facility before the structural integrity hits zero

pickup.name: Rainbow Algae
pickup.effect: Allows player to create colorful illusions

encounters.trigger: Opening a giant clam reveals the path to the Jellyfish Grove

pickup.name: Singing Conch
pickup.effect: Emits a sonic frequency that stuns crustaceans

encounters.trigger: Clearing the weeds causes the singing conch to fall, attracting the next guardian

pickup.name: Bubble Wand of Holding
pickup.effect: Traps enemies in a stasis bubble

encounters.trigger: Defeating the crab unlocks the entrance to the Abyssal Throne Room

boss.name: King Octo-Whimsy
boss.victory_condition: Trapping the boss in the Bubble Wand of Holding to restore order

level.objective: Retrieve the Sunken Crown of Laughter from King Octo-Whimsy
level.reward: The ability to breathe water and turn into a bubble

encounters.hazard: Swamp gas pockets that reduce vision

pickup.name: Fermented Berry Cluster
pickup.effect: Temporarily increases movement speed and beast summoning range

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Stalker opens the path to the canopy bridge

pickup.name: Ancient Serpent Scale
pickup.effect: Reflects projectile damage and allows climbing vertical surfaces

encounters.trigger: Securing the vine sentinel's core unlocks the sealed gate to the temple sanctum

encounters.hazard: Falling debris from the crumbling ceiling

pickup.name: Sun-Touched Idol
pickup.effect: Makes the wearer immune to petrification effects

encounters.trigger: Shattering the Guardian's idol focus summons the High Priest

boss.name: High Priest of the Deep Wilds
boss.victory_condition: Channel the Sun-Touched Idol's energy into the altar to dispel the Priest's invulnerability shield

level.objective: Traverse the chaotic ruins and purge the corruption from the sacred grove.
level.reward: The Beastmaster's Command Amulet: Allows summoning of the elite jungle predators.

level.setting: The Whispering Canopy, an ancient, mist-covered tropical forest where the trees seem to lean inward.

pickup.name: Glowing Amber Shard
pickup.effect: Reveals hidden environmental paths

encounters.trigger: Approaching the archway triggers a rustling in the vines, drawing the Stalker out.

enemy.name: Moss-Covered Construct
enemy.weakness: Requires the Glowing Amber Shard to expose its core

pickup.name: Ancient Sun Dial
pickup.effect: Allows manipulation of light sources

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Vine Stalker reveals a key mechanism that activates the Construct.

enemy.name: Shadow Jaguar
enemy.weakness: Stunned by light reflected from the Ancient Sun Dial

pickup.name: Heart of the Jungle
pickup.effect: Grants immunity to jungle toxins

encounters.trigger: Using the Sun Dial in the temple triggers the collapse of a wall, unleashing the jaguar.

boss.name: The Root Weaver Matriarch
boss.weakness: The Heart of the Jungle neutralizes her poisonous root aura
boss.victory_condition: Sever the primary root node using the Recurve Bow while the aura is neutralized

level.objective: Traverse the Whispering Canopy and cleanse the Root Weaver Matriarch of the corruption poisoning the forest.
level.reward: The Ranger's Mark, an enchanted cloak that grants permanent stealth in woodland terrain.

pickup.name: Alchemist's Fire Vial
pickup.effect: Deals massive burn damage to flammable surfaces and creatures

encounters.trigger: Stepping on the Serpent's nest alerts the pack, forcing entry into the deeper ruins.

pickup.name: Ancient Vibration Key
pickup.effect: Resonates at high frequencies, shattering brittle crystal formations

encounters.trigger: Destroying the Sentinel causes the stone floor to crumble, opening the path to the forbidden vault.

enemy.name: Shadow Stalker Panther
enemy.weakness: Loud noise from the Ancient Vibration Key

pickup.name: Essence of the Night-Bloom
pickup.effect: Temporarily grants invisibility and reveals the location of the Heart of the Jungle

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Panther reveals the pedestal where the final boss lies dormant.

boss.name: Guardian of the Heart
boss.weakness: Essence of the Night-Bloom used to distract the spectral eyes
boss.victory_condition: Severing the vines connecting the Guardian to the Heart of the Jungle

level.objective: Retrieve the Heart of the Jungle from the center of the ruins.
level.reward: The Silent Step Boots, allowing the player to sprint without sound.

pickup.name: Sun-Kissed Petal
pickup.effect: Restores 20 health and emits light

encounters.trigger: The fallen sapling reveals a hidden path leading deeper into the jungle.

pickup.name: Ancient Stone Idol
pickup.effect: Allows interaction with sacred totems

encounters.trigger: Defeating the creeper causes it to drop an Ancient Stone Idol necessary to open the Temple Gate.

pickup.name: Crystalline Pollen
pickup.effect: Increases damage against chaotic spirits

encounters.trigger: Clearing the vines unveils the inner sanctum where the boss awaits.

boss.name: Verdant Spire Beast
boss.victory_condition: Use the pollen to reveal the beast's heart and strike it with the Spirit Bow.

level.objective: Restore balance to the sacred grove by cleansing the corruption from the central altar.
level.reward: The Warden's Mantle, which grants immunity to environmental hazards.

level.setting: The Whispering Canopy, an ancient, overgrown ruin where shadows move independently of the light.

encounters.hazard: Thick fog that drains mana over time

pickup.name: Spectral Essence Vial
pickup.effect: Allows the player to freeze non-corporeal entities in place for 3 seconds.

encounters.trigger: Entering the jaguar's territory alerts a nearby Shadow Lurker.

encounters.hazard: Unstable vines that grapple the player

pickup.name: Cursed Idol of Blight
pickup.effect: Increases damage against plant-based enemies by 50%.

encounters.trigger: Killing the Lurker breaks the seal on the Ancient Grove.

encounters.hazard: Spikes rising from the floor at random intervals

pickup.name: Heart of the Jungle
pickup.effect: Emits a pulse that disrupts necrotic energy.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Guardian causes the monolith to open, revealing the boss.

boss.name: The Necrotic Overlord
boss.victory_condition: Use the Heart of the Jungle to negate the Overlord's shield, then strike with the Scythe.

level.objective: Purify the corruption within the Whispering Canopy and defeat the Necrotic Overlord.

pickup.name: Sparkling Pollen
pickup.effect: Increases movement speed and makes the player float slightly

encounters.trigger: Approaching the Singing Orchid triggers the second encounter

pickup.name: Distilled Moonlight
pickup.effect: Causes the player's attacks to blind enemies

encounters.trigger: Crossing the rope bridge triggers the third encounter

pickup.name: Ancient Jungle Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the path to the Sun Temple

encounters.trigger: Using the Ancient Jungle Key on the temple gate triggers the boss fight

boss.name: The Great Floral Golem
boss.weakness: Ancient Jungle Key (used as a focus for the Alchemical Acid Flask)
boss.victory_condition: Reduce boss health to zero while utilizing the key to destabilize its core

level.objective: Restore color to the desaturated heart of the jungle

pickup.name: Stasis Amulet
pickup.effect: Freezes enemies in place for 3 seconds

encounters.trigger: Defeating the jaguar causes a time-tear that reveals a hidden jungle path forward

pickup.name: Chronos Lantern
pickup.effect: Reveals hidden objects and structural weaknesses in shadows

encounters.trigger: Cutting the vines open reveals a pulsing energy core that creates a portal to the boss arena

encounters.hazard: Swamp gas causing hallucinatory combat effects

pickup.name: Sun-Dial Shard
pickup.effect: Allows mastery over the boss's time-phase ability

encounters.trigger: The guardian collapses into a key required to unlock the main chamber gate

boss.name: Chronos-Eater Ape
boss.victory_condition: Use the Sun-Dial Shard to shatter the boss's temporal shield before landing the final blow

level.objective: Traverse the cursed jungle and silence the temporal anomaly at the altar

level.setting: An overgrown, fog-choked rainforest where the flora feeds on the rot of ancient civilization.

pickup.name: Corrosive Sap Vial
pickup.effect: Deals massive damage to metallic armor.

encounters.trigger: Upon defeating the Strangler, the screeching of its death rattle awakens the dormant mechanical defenses of the inner temple.

pickup.name: Ancient Sunstone
pickup.effect: Provides an aura of blinding heat.

encounters.trigger: The Sentinel crashes into the primary power generator, causing a seismic surge that reveals the boss chamber.

encounters.location: The Heart of the Jungle Shrine

pickup.name: Sacred Serpent Eye
pickup.effect: Nullifies shadow-based magic.

encounters.trigger: The Golem's demise shatters the seal on the final boss chamber, summoning the Shadow Monarch.

boss.name: Shadow Monarch
boss.victory_condition: Use the Sacred Serpent Eye to reveal the Shadow Monarch's true form, making him vulnerable to standard attacks.

level.objective: Traverse the decaying jungle to deactivate the necrotic obelisk corrupting the region.
level.reward: The Berserker's Eternal Rage: A permanent 20% attack speed buff.
